name: Fresh-machine path
when_to_use: Verify the experience on a machine with no prior cache or state

name: Environment skew
when_to_use: OS, shell, architecture, package manager, runtime version variance

name: Credentials and permissions
when_to_use: Missing tokens, expired credentials, insufficient scopes, offline mode

name: Partial setup
when_to_use: One service running and another not; missing codegen; stale fixtures

name: Version skew
when_to_use: Docs, SDK, server, schema, examples, generated code drift

name: Destructive operations
when_to_use: Data migration, irreversible side effect, secret in log

name: External dependencies
when_to_use: Network flake, vendor outage, nondeterministic fixture

name: Backward compatibility
when_to_use: Existing users; deprecated paths still working

name: Contributor path
when_to_use: Local setup, tests, PR evidence, release notes from a fresh fork
